channel.title: Preventative
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Preventative, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: In Connecticut, Individual Providers Sue Patients More Often Than Hospitals Do
item.description: A weekly newsletter roundup covering original health reporting, including a look at medical debt litigation patterns among Connecticut healthcare providers.

item.title: Podcast Recap: RFK Jr. Faces Congressional Scrutiny Over Budget Priorities
item.description: HHS Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. concluded testimony before House and Senate committees in connection with the administration's proposed budget, drawing pointed questions from lawmakers.

item.title: Reader Responses on Reproductive Rights, AI Therapy, Medical Debt and Other Topics
item.description: KFF Health News shares reader feedback on recent coverage spanning reproductive rights, therapy chatbots, medical debt, and other health policy issues.

item.title: In Connecticut, Individual Providers Sue Patients More Often Than Hospitals Do
item.description: A weekly newsletter roundup covering original health reporting, including a look at medical debt litigation patterns among Connecticut healthcare providers.

item.title: Podcast Recap: RFK Jr. Faces Congressional Scrutiny Over Budget Priorities
item.description: HHS Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. concluded testimony before House and Senate committees in connection with the administration's proposed budget, drawing pointed questions from lawmakers.
